runs.note: Fixed encryption vulnerability by upgrading from insecure AES-128-ECB to secure algorithms: AES-128-CBC for legacy partners and AES-256-GCM for modern partners. Added proper IV generation and authentication tags. Implemented key rotation to migrate existing ECB-encrypted keys to secure algorithms while maintaining backward compatibility.
